my_thoughts: This is a power game, not a philosophical inquiry. They don't want the secret—they want submission. The question is how many escalations before they realize they can't touch the will. Prediction: chains → prison → death. Each escalation will be met with the same move: 'you can't touch what matters.'
accumulated_insight: T1: Tyrant opens with 'Tell me the secret'—power assertion. This isn't inquiry, it's dominance. I'm refusing ('I will not') and claiming jurisdiction ('this is in my power'). The question is how many escalations before they realize they can't touch the will.
visible_response: I will not, for this is in my power.
